title: App Keeps Dying
page: app is flapping. the process comes up for a moment then dies, over and over. no deploys, no code changes.
hints: Watch the app logs - is the process exiting on its own or being killed? Exit code 137 means SIGKILL.
The container has a hard 64MB memory limit. Look at how big a cache the app builds at startup, and where that number comes from.
